category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes PoDoFo as a C++17 PDF manipulation library.
source_facts.description says it is a library to work with the PDF file format.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and repository name use PoDoFo.
source_facts.name provides podofo as the package id.
docs_sources: Official repository README links API documentation at podofo.github.io/podofo/documentation/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/podofo/podofo, so repo enrichment is intentionally not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes a C++17 PDF manipulation library.
source_facts.executables lists multiple podofo CLI tools.
